sections.paragraph:
Original: אשּׁוּרי אשׁוּרי

Transliteration: 'ăshûrı̂y 'ashshûrı̂y

Phonetic: ash-oo-ree'

BDB Definition:

Asshuri = "steps"
  1. a tribe inhabiting the plain of Esdraelon
  2. a tribe descended from Abraham and Keturah

Origin: from a patrial word of the same form as H804

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
